originalTitle: AeroVironment (AVAV) Stock Dips While Market Gains: Key Facts
summary: AeroVironment (AVAV) concluded the recent trading session at $141.22, signifying a -1.57% move from its prior day's close.
content:
AeroVironment (AVAV) closed the most recent trading day at $141.22, moving -1.57% from the previous trading session. This change lagged the S&P 500's 0.38% gain on the day. On the other hand, the Dow registered a gain of 0.29%, and the technology-centric Nasdaq increased by 0.62%.

Prior to today's trading, shares of the maker of unmanned aircrafts had lost 13.94% lagged the Aerospace sector's loss of 2.35% and the S&P 500's gain of 1.61%.

The upcoming earnings release of AeroVironment will be of great interest to investors. In that report, analysts expect AeroVironment to post earnings of $0.34 per share. This would mark year-over-year growth of 6.25%. Alongside, our most recent consensus estimate is anticipating revenue of $474.57 million, indicating a 4.38% upward movement from the same quarter last year.

In terms of the entire fiscal year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates predict earnings of $3.4 per share and a revenue of $2.18 billion, indicating changes of +2.72% and +10.1%, respectively, from the former year.

It is also important to note the recent changes to analyst estimates for AeroVironment. These latest adjustments often mirror the shifting dynamics of short-term business patterns. Hence, positive alterations in estimates signify analyst optimism regarding the business and profitability.

Our research reveals that these estimate alterations are directly linked with the stock price performance in the near future. To take advantage of this, we've established the Zacks Rank, an exclusive model that considers these estimated changes and delivers an operational rating system.

The Zacks Rank system ranges from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell). It has a remarkable, outside-audited track record of success, with #1 stocks delivering an average annual return of +25% since 1988. Within the past 30 days, our consensus EPS projection has moved 16.36% lower. AeroVironment currently has a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold).

In the context of valuation, AeroVironment is at present trading with a Forward P/E ratio of 42.25. This expresses a premium compared to the average Forward P/E of 36.9 of its industry.

Meanwhile, AVAV's PEG ratio is currently 2.16. The PEG ratio is similar to the widely-used P/E ratio, but this metric also takes the company's expected earnings growth rate into account. By the end of yesterday's trading, the Aerospace - Defense Equipment industry had an average PEG ratio of 2.24.

The Aerospace - Defense Equipment industry is part of the Aerospace sector. At present, this industry carries a Zacks Industry Rank of 94, placing it within the top 39% of over 250 industries.

The Zacks Industry Rank is ordered from best to worst in terms of the average Zacks Rank of the individual companies within each of these sectors. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

Ensure to harness Zacks.com to stay updated with all these stock-shifting metrics, among others, in the next trading sessions.

chineseTitle: AeroVironment (AVAV) 股价下跌，而市场上涨：关键事实
chineseSummary: AeroVironment (AVAV) 最近交易日收于 141.22 美元，较前一日收盘价上涨 -1.57%。
chineseContent:
AeroVironment (AVAV) 最近一个交易日收于 141.22 美元，较前一交易日上涨 -1.57%。这一变化落后于标准普尔 500 指数当日 0.38% 的涨幅。另一方面，道指上涨0.29%，以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数上涨0.62%。

在今天的交易之前，这家无人机制造商的股价下跌了 13.94%，落后于航空航天板块的下跌 2.35% 和标准普尔 500 指数的上涨 1.61%。

AeroVironment 即将发布的财报将引起投资者的极大兴趣。在该报告中，分析师预计 AeroVironment 将公布每股收益 0.34 美元。这将标志着同比增长 6.25%。此外，我们最近的一致预测是预计收入为 4.7457 亿美元，比去年同期增长 4.38%。

就整个财年而言，Zacks 一致预期预计每股收益为 3.4 美元，营收为 21.8 亿美元，较上年分别变化 +2.72% 和 +10.1%。

同样重要的是要注意分析师对 AeroVironment 的估计最近的变化。这些最新的调整通常反映了短期业务模式的动态变化。因此，预测的积极变化表明分析师对业务和盈利能力持乐观态度。

我们的研究表明，这些估计的变化与近期的股价表现直接相关。为了利用这一点，我们建立了 Zacks Rank，这是一个独特的模型，考虑了这些估计的变化并提供了一个可操作的评级系统。

Zacks 排名系统范围从#1（强力买入）到#5（强力卖出）。它拥有非凡的、经过外部审计的成功记录，自 1988 年以来排名第一的股票平均年回报率为 +25%。在过去 30 天内，我们的共识 EPS 预测下降了 16.36%。 AeroVironment 目前的 Zacks 排名为#3（持有）。

在估值方面，AeroVironment 目前的远期市盈率为 42.25。与行业平均预期市盈率 36.9 相比，这存在溢价。

与此同时，AVAV 的 PEG 比率目前为 2.16。 PEG比率与广泛使用的市盈率类似，但该指标也考虑了公司的预期盈利增长率。截至昨日收盘，航空航天-国防装备行业平均PEG率为2.24。

航空航天-国防设备行业是航空航天部门的一部分。目前，该行业的 Zacks 行业排名为 94，在 250 多个行业中排名前 39%。

Zacks 行业排名是根据每个行业内各个公司的平均 Zacks 排名从最好到最差排序的。我们的研究表明，排名前 50% 的行业的表现比排名后一半的行业高出 2 比 1。

确保利用 Zacks.com 在接下来的交易时段中及时了解所有这些库存转移指标等。
